data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions a 10% higher price for downtown services, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or data that demonstrate the system's capability to apply this pricing model. Therefore, a gap exists in the validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of location-specific pricing being applied or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
